# `.github/` — Automation & templates

CI/CD and community configuration.

| Path | Role |
|------|------|
| `dependabot.yml` | Weekly updates for GitHub Actions and dev npm deps (grouped minor/patch). |
| [`workflows/`](workflows/README.md) | CI (lint · quality · security), CD gate, and tagged Release. |
| `PULL_REQUEST_TEMPLATE.md` | PR checklist (Conventional Commits, verified, no secrets). |
| [`ISSUE_TEMPLATE/`](ISSUE_TEMPLATE/README.md) | Bug report & feature request forms. |

↑ Back to the [project root](../README.md).
